basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technician and Senior Project Mechanic Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.post_name: Project Technician OR Senior Project Mechanic
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Project Technician OR Senior Project Mechanic Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iitk.ac.in/. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Kanpur Project Technician OR Senior Project Mechanic Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Sc + 4 years relevant experience, 3 years Engg. Diploma + ITI + 4 years relevant experience, High School + ITI + 9 years relevant experience, 3 years Engg. Diploma, High School + ITI + 5 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Project Technician: B. Sc + 4 years relevant experience OR 3 years Engg. Diploma + ITI + 4 years relevant experience OR High School + ITI + 9 years relevant experience Senior Project Mechanic: 3 years Engg. Diploma OR High School + ITI + 5 years relevant experience

salary_details.details: Project Technician: Rs. 18000-1500-45000 Senior Project Mechanic: Rs 13000-1100-32800

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Technician: B. Sc + 4 years relevant experience OR 3 years Engg. Diploma + ITI + 4 years relevant experience OR High School + ITI + 9 years relevant experience Senior Project Mechanic: 3 years Engg. Diploma OR High School + ITI + 5 years relevant experience

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Technician: Rs. 18000-1500-45000 Senior Project Mechanic: Rs 13000-1100-32800

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT Kanpur recruitment is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technician and Senior Project Mechanic posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by IIT Kanpur. One vacancy is for the Project Technician post and the other is for the Senior Project Mechanic post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technician post?
faq.answer: For the Project Technician position, candidates need a B. Sc degree with 4 years of relevant experience, or a 3-year Engineering Diploma with ITI and 4 years of relevant experience, or High School with ITI and 9 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Mechanic role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Project Mechanic post is in the range of Rs 13000 to Rs 32800, with a pay scale increment of Rs 1100.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for both Project Technician and Senior Project Mechanic posts is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official IIT Kanpur website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The positions of Project Technician and Senior Project Mechanic at IIT Kanpur are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions. Candidates from all eligible backgrounds can apply online, provided they meet the specified educational and experience criteria.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly.
